title: Add option for Workload widget to show completed tasks
excerpt: I would like to be able to have completed tasks (status of DONE) displayed on the Workload widget as an option - this would allow me to show how busy (or not) team members had been over previous months.

posts.author: DavidG (David Giffin)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to have completed tasks (status of DONE) displayed on the Workload widget as an option - this would allow me to show how busy (or not) team members had been over previous months.
